project_type: Next.js 14 app with Prisma ORM, Neon PostgreSQL, retro-gaming UI system
build_system: npm with Next.js, Prisma for ORM/migrations
test_framework: vitest with jsdom environment, tests in tests/unit/ and tests/api/, mocks via vi.mock
verification_instructions: Run `npm run verify:draft` which does lint + test + build. All three must pass.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. No real database available (uses mock prisma in tests, fake DB URL for builds). Discord OAuth env vars not configured in sandbox.
contribution_requirements: verify:draft must pass (lint + test + build). Do not break admin workflows. Do not remove fallback keys. Do not remove standalone drafts. Prefer additive cleanup over massive rewrites.
key_patterns: RetroWindow/PixelBadge/BrutalButton UI components. Server components fetch data, client components handle interactivity. API routes use resolveMatchCaptainAuth/resolveDraftCaptainAuth for dual Discord+key auth. Test pattern: vi.mock modules, import mocks, test each code path with explicit assertions.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes; lib/ - shared utilities (auth, db, draft logic); components/ - reusable UI (Nav, Footer, ui/); tests/ - unit and API tests; prisma/ - schema and migrations; docs/ - operational docs
